title: Estora Guard
blurb: Real-estate transaction platform with a role-aware AI agent secured by NemoClaw — LlamaParse contract ingestion, deal health scoring, manifest-driven policy gates with human approval on PII, and a red-team attack console that runs eight adversarial cases against the policy layer.

title: EchoBrief
blurb: Meeting-intelligence SaaS with two recording paths feeding one pipeline — a Recall calendar bot and a Chrome MV3 extension that persists state to chrome.storage.local so recordings survive service-worker restarts. Sarvam STT with Whisper fallback, GPT-4o-mini for structured insights, multi-channel delivery (Slack, email, digest reports).

title: GodownAI
blurb: Warehouse-rental invoicing platform for Indian landlords. Auto-detects GST treatment from the GSTIN (CGST/SGST vs IGST), generates invoice PDFs client-side with jsPDF, delivers via Resend, and time-locks payment reminders so you can't fire one off before the due-date buffer expires.

title: NexusCommerce
blurb: AI-native e-commerce admin platform — natural-language → validated SQL over a whitelisted table set, RAG email generation with pgvector, idempotent Razorpay webhooks (HMAC verified), and a React Flow visual workflow builder. Powers Alyra in production.

title: ClarityBot
blurb: Live AI fact-checking pipeline built on the OpenClaw five-skill agent shape: extractor → searcher → crossref → scorer → emitter. Credibility-aware scoring with hard caps when evidence is weak, every stage streamed to the UI over Server-Sent Events so the agent's reasoning is inspectable in real time.

title: Alyra
blurb: Headless Shopify storefront for an early-stage solid-perfumes brand in India. Custom Razorpay checkout, webhook-driven order automation, GA4 + Meta Pixel attribution. Generated $10k+ in revenue in the first six months — and runs on the NexusCommerce backend.

title: ContractIQ
blurb: Six-agent contract-renewal platform for the Enterprise Agents Hackathon. IBM Watsonx Orchestrate as the master, FastAPI + Redis + Anthropic + Tavily underneath, WebSocket live agent feed, 40+ extracted contract fields with per-field confidence scoring.

title: Resolvr
blurb: Multi-agent conflict arbitration — when two AIs disagree on a recommendation, who decides? Five-stage SSE pipeline (forensics → grounding → simulation → brief), Veris-sandboxed agents, Baseten-served Claude Sonnet 4.5, and You.com for live market grounding. Built for Enterprise Agent Jam NYC 2026.

title: Outdoor AR Navigation
blurb: AR navigation app overlaying directions on the real world while detecting obstacles and points of interest in real time. ARCore + Unity for AR tracking, YOLOv3 for obstacle detection, Azure Maps for routing — 30+ FPS on mid-range Android.
